_comment: SHOWCASE mutation table (C-fix 7): a clean, presentable delta fixture pair - no degraded collectors, no dropped sections, no denylist noise. The dense fixture's Insider Risk block ships CmdletUnavailable (deliberate role-gap shape for the torture pair), so BOTH sides override it to Empty here - the showcase pair is degradation-free by declared intent.
